title: Tangy Gooey Croatian Tomato Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly Mediterranean-inspired dish featuring tangy tomatoes cooked with spices and a hint of fermentation for extra flavor.

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon cumin seeds
ingredients.notes: Roasted and crushed for a deeper flavor

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup fermented vegetables (e.g., kimchi or sauerkraut), finely chopped

instructions: Chop the cherry tomatoes in half.
Place cherry tomato halves, garlic, and cumin seeds on a baking sheet. Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with salt and pepper. Roast for about 8-10 minutes until the edges are slightly browned.
While tomatoes are roasting, mix together lime juice, chopped fermented vegetables, parsley, and a pinch of salt in a large bowl.
Stir-fry roasted cherry tomato halves in a wok or large skillet over medium heat with a tablespoon of olive oil. Cook until the pieces are tender but still juicy and coated with oil, about 5 minutes.
Add lime mixture to stir-fried tomatoes and cook for another 2-3 minutes until heated through.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
